headline: Gen to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
summary: Gen Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: GEN), a global leader dedicated to powering Digital Freedom, today announced that Vincent Pilette, Chief Executive Officer of Gen, and Natalie Derse, Chief Financial Officer of Gen, will participate in the following investor conferences:

headline: Avast One: Free to Start. Yours to Build. Only What You Choose.
summary: You already know what you need for your digital life. You've done the research, read the threads, tuned the settings. The last thing you want is a security suite that assumes you haven't.
